name: akbun-cardnews-B
description: Card news builder by akbun — turns text and images into cover/content page layouts, image-generation AI prompts, and Figma/Canva-ready SVGs

interface.shortDescription: Card news copy, image prompts, and Figma/Canva-ready SVGs
interface.longDescription: Builds Instagram-style card news from user text and images: cover and content page copy, English prompts for image-generation AI agents, and editable SVG pages that import into Figma or Canva, all on a fixed photo-plus-black-panel layout.
defaultPrompt: 이 글과 이미지로 카드뉴스 표지와 내용 페이지를 만들어줘
Make card news cover/content SVGs and image prompts from this text
